name: wireless_charger_basic
description: Wireless charger spec vs wireless power patent. High overlap expected for coil and position sensor elements.
target_spec:
Wireless Charger with Coil-Alignment Feedback

This product includes a transmitter coil that operates at resonance frequency to transfer power wirelessly. A position sensor detects the receiver coil position with high accuracy. A controller adjusts the drive signal frequency based on the detected position to maximize power transfer efficiency. The system also provides power regulation from 5 W to 15 W.

patent.title: Wireless power transfer with adaptive coil alignment
claims: 1. A wireless power transfer apparatus comprising a transmitter coil; a position sensor configured to detect a position of a receiver coil; and a controller configured to adjust a drive signal based on the detected position.
2. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the position sensor comprises a plurality of magnetic field sensors.

expected_verdicts.rationale: transmitter coil appears directly in spec
position sensor and receiver coil position both appear in spec
controller, drive signal, and detected position all appear in spec
